overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit city at night. The character crosses streets, walks along sidewalks with vibrant pink neon buildings, traverses open plazas with digital billboards, and approaches unique spherical architecture while rain creates reflective wet surfaces throughout the urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: character crosses yellow striped crosswalk while pedestrian signal shows walk

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet crosswalk in the rain toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: walking in opposite direction across the crosswalk

entered.detail: yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing painted on wet asphalt with reflective surface
tall pole with illuminated pedestrian walk signal showing white figure
large pink neon sign with Japanese characters reading TENGU on distant building

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rainy urban intersection at night, with the character crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk. The wet asphalt reflects the surrounding neon lights, and a prominent pink Tengu sign is visible in the distance. Other pedestrians cross in the opposite direction as the character moves toward the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated sidewalk and staircase overlooking multi-lane street

events.description: character ascends stairs to raised platform overlooking the street below
turns right onto sidewalk alongside building with bright pink neon facade

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs to an elevated walkway then proceeding along the sidewalk next to the street

notable_agents.action: cars driving along the wet street with headlights reflecting on the rain-soaked pavement

entered.detail: elevated concrete walkway with red painted edges overlooking the street below
large orange and black striped structural support column
building exterior illuminated with continuous bright pink neon tube lights along its length

segments.scene_description: The character ascends to an elevated platform with an orange structural pillar, overlooking the street where cars drive with reflected headlights. Turning right, the character walks alongside a building facade illuminated with vibrant pink neon lights, while the Tengu sign remains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with continuous pink neon illumination and digital billboards

events.description: passing large illuminated cola advertisement billboard on building wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the neon-lit sidewalk passing various digital advertisements and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in red pants walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: large illuminated screen displaying animated advertisements on the building wall
bright white billboard with cola branding and product imagery

segments.scene_description: Walking along the continuous pink neon-lit building facade, the character passes large digital billboards including a prominent cola advertisement. The wet sidewalk reflects the pink and white lights, while other pedestrians walk ahead and cars pass by on the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with large digital displays and seating areas

events.description: turns left from sidewalk into open plaza area with scattered pedestrians and large screens
camera tilts upward to look at towering skyscrapers with illuminated advertisements against the night sky

agents.ego_description: turning into the plaza and walking across the open tiled area toward large digital screens, then looking up at the buildings

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking across the plaza in the rain

entered.detail: massive curved digital screens displaying advertisements in the center of the open plaza
modern benches with integrated lighting along the edge of the plaza
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows and large rooftop signage visible against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Turning left into an open pedestrian plaza, the character walks across wet tiled pavement toward massive digital screens. The camera tilts upward to reveal towering skyscrapers with bright advertisements against the dark rainy sky, while modern benches line the plaza edges.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with overhead digital displays and neon storefronts

events.description: enters covered walkway section with overhead structural elements and digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered plaza area observing the surrounding digital displays and neon-lit storefronts

entered.detail: partially covered pedestrian area with overhead structural beams and lighting
distant view of unique building with spherical pod structures illuminated in teal

segments.scene_description: Moving through a semi-covered walkway with overhead digital displays, the character approaches a unique spherical building structure visible in the distance. Neon-lit storefronts line the right side while the wet pavement continues to reflect the colorful lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway adjacent to distinctive spherical stacked architecture

events.description: approaches unique spherical building structure with teal illuminated pods
camera tilts upward to view stacked spherical pods and towering skyscraper with advertisements

agents.ego_description: approaching the spherical building and looking up at the unique architecture while rain continues to fall

notable_agents.action: figure visible through window of spherical pod structure

entered.detail: futuristic building with multiple rounded pod structures stacked vertically with teal interior lighting

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a striking building with stacked spherical pods illuminated in teal. The camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the spherical architecture and adjacent skyscrapers with bright advertisements, while rain falls against the dark night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban district that evolves from a busy street intersection into a plaza dominated by futuristic spherical architecture. It begins with the character crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk on wet asphalt that reflects a distant pink Tengu sign, before ascending an elevated platform to walk alongside a building facade bathed in vibrant pink neon. As the character passes large digital billboards and cola advertisements, the scene opens into a wide pedestrian plaza where the camera tilts upward to reveal towering skyscrapers and bright advertisements against the dark, rainy sky. The movement then shifts through a semi-covered walkway lined with neon storefronts, leading the character toward a unique architectural landmark. Finally, the camera tilts up once more to capture the full height of a building composed of stacked teal spherical pods nestled among the surrounding city spires.
